basic_details.job_title: Nagaland University Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Nagaland University has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Research Assistant Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Post graduate in any social science discipline (55% minimum) with NET/ M.Phil/ Ph.D.
qualification.details: Post graduate in any social science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks. Must possess NET/ M.Phil/ Ph.D. qualification.

salary_details.details: NET/Ph.D.: Rs. 25,000/- PM Non-NET: Rs. 20,000/- PM

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Nagaland University Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Nagaland University Research Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Nagaland University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Nagaland University Research Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Nagaland University Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Assistant position at Nagaland University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Assistant position at Nagaland University is 15th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a postgraduate degree in any social science discipline with at least 55% marks and must also possess NET/M.Phil/Ph.D. qualification to be eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Research Assistant position varies based on qualification. It is Rs. 25,000/- PM for candidates with NET/Ph.D. and Rs. 20,000/- PM for those without NET.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Research Assistant job at Nagaland University?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach required documents, and send it to the official email address of Nagaland University before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Research Assistant post in this recruitment drive by Nagaland University.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Nagaland University Research Assistant recruitment is No-NU/TE-M.Ed/Admn-1/2017/995.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The Research Assistant position at Nagaland University is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Nagaland University located?
faq.answer: Nagaland University is located in Kohima, Nagaland, with the pincode 797004.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
